name: Banoffi Dessert
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the cans of condensed milk in a deep kettle or saucepan and cover with water. Bring to a boil.
2. Continue boiling for 5 hours, ensuring the cans remain fully covered by boiling water. Add more water as needed.
3. Remove the cans from the water and let cool overnight (at least 8 hours).
4. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
5. Lightly grease a 10-inch flan pan.
6. Line the bottom of the pan with puff pastry sheets.
7. Prick the bottom several times with a fork.
8. Fill the pan with dry beans to keep the crust from deforming.
9. Bake until crisp, then remove the dry beans and let cool.
10. Open the cans of boiled condensed milk and pour into the baked crust.
11. Peel and halve ripe bananas lengthwise; place over the condensed milk.
12. In a bowl, whisk together instant coffee powder, sugar, and heavy cream until smooth.
13. Spoon the whipped mixture over the bananas and condensed milk.
14. Sprinkle with ground coffee grounds.
15. Serve chilled.
